Hi Job Seekers, 
We are Hiring for Senior GenAI Consultant/ Data Scientist - Remote

Job Title: Senior GenAI Consultant/ Data Scientist
Location: Remote – India (Supporting US Time Zone)
Job Type: Long Term Contract 
Shift: Night Shift (US Time Zone)
Must have 8+years of experience 

Need Senior GenAI Consultant/ Data Scientist to lead the design and implementation of AI-driven QA automation solutions, with a strong focus on agentic AI frameworks for test case generation, optimization, and self-healing automation.
 
The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Generative AI, Machine Learning, and Test Automation, and a proven track record of designing and deploying agent-based AI systems that improve testing efficiency, coverage, and ROI.
 
Design and implement Generative AI solutions for QA, including:
- Automated test case generation from requirements/user stories
- Test optimization and redundancy reduction
- Intelligent defect prediction and root cause analysis
 
Architect and deploy agentic AI systems for QA automation:
- Multi-agent orchestration (planner, executor, validator agents)
- Autonomous test execution and self-healing capabilities
 
- Build, fine-tune, and deploy LLMs and ML models for QA use cases
 
- Proven experience applying AI/ML in QA automation and Test case generation/optimization
- Hands-on experience with Large Language Models (LLMs)

Urgent #hiring #Immediate #C2C

🚨 Role: AI Enterprise Architect
📍 Location: Remote
Duration: 12+ Months Contract

✅ Job Description: The Enterprise Architect is responsible for initiating and leading strategic solutions that fulfill specific business and technology outcomes. Solutions include projects, products, systems (including applications, technologies, processes, and information), shared infrastructure services and shared application services. The Enterprise Architect leads the analysis and design tasks to support the development of enterprise solutions that cross multiple domains to ensure that the resulting architecture meets the business needs and align with architecture governance and standards. This position also leads the creation of deliverables that help develop target-state guidance (reusable standards, guidelines, individual parts, platforms, and configurations) for evolving the architecture across the enterprise. The role is responsible for being highly collaborative and interactive across multiple business and IT areas, proactively assist in defining the direction for future projects to ensure strategy alignment.

✅ Key Responsibilities: 
✔️ Actively manage, communicate, and market the AI strategy via creation and maintenance of architecture blueprints, roadmaps, and executive presentations
✔️ Partner with leaders and other architects to lead and/or facilitate supporting Data Strategy to achieve enterprise goals and objectives
✔️ Deep experience with AIML platforms, AI RAG and Agentic applications trends and patterns, data lakes, data warehouses, tools and technologies
✔️ Proven track record of successfully modernizing technology capabilities using public cloud services (Google Cloud Platform, Amazon Web Services), event streaming, AI, and Machine Learning
✔️ Significant experience defining and standardizing design and architecture patterns for AI & ML solutions, data integrations, data warehouses, data lakes and data marts
✔️ Experience with the security practices associated with AI and ML
✔️ Experience as a senior level architect working on significant enterprise initiatives

📩 If you have suitable profiles or are available yourself, connect with us or send resumes directly via DM or email at innaiah@veritis.com

#AI #Architect #AIArchitect #RAG #ML #Agentic #EnterpriseArchitect #Remote
